preview:
Read the poem and answer the question.

Poem: 'Uniforms Unite Us All'

School uniforms should be compulsory in every Australian school.
They create equality among students, regardless of family income.
When everyone wears the same clothes, no one feels embarrassed about what they can afford.
Uniform
